1: In a dry and thirsty land, where no water is;
2: So as as I have seen thee in the sanctuary.
4: Thus will I bless thee while I live: I will lift up my hands in thy name.
5: And my mouth shall praise thee thee with joyful lips:
6: And And meditate on thee in the night night watches.
7: Therefore in the shadow of thy wings will I rejoice.
9: Shall go into the lower parts of the earth.
10: They shall be a portion for foxes.
11: But the mouth of them that speak lies shall be stopped.
